name: Amoxicillin 500mg
description: Amoxicillin is a penicillin antibiotic that fights bacteria. It is used to treat many different types of infection caused by bacteria, such as tonsillitis, bronchitis, pneumonia, and infections of the ear, nose, throat, skin, or urinary tract.
dosage: Take one capsule three times daily after food, or as prescribed by your doctor. Complete the full course of treatment.
safetyAdvice: Avoid alcohol while taking this medication. Inform your doctor if you have kidney disease or asthma.

name: Lipitor (Atorvastatin) 20mg
description: Atorvastatin is a statin medication used to prevent cardiovascular disease in those at high risk and lower abnormal lipid levels. It decreases 'bad' cholesterol (LDL) and triglycerides, and increases 'good' cholesterol (HDL).
dosage: Take one tablet daily at the same time, with or without food, as directed by your cardiologist.
safetyAdvice: Do not consume grapefruit or grapefruit juice as it increases the level of Atorvastatin in your blood. Avoid use during pregnancy.

name: Metformin 850mg
description: Metformin is the first-line medication for the treatment of type 2 diabetes, particularly in people who are overweight. It helps control blood sugar levels by improving how your body handles insulin.
dosage: Usually taken with meals, starting once daily and increasing to twice or thrice daily, or as advised by your physician.
safetyAdvice: Drink plenty of fluids. Risk of lactic acidosis is extremely low but increases with renal impairment or heavy alcohol use.

name: Paracetamol (Acetaminophen) 650mg
description: Paracetamol is a widely used over-the-counter pain reliever and fever reducer. It is commonly used for headaches, muscle aches, arthritis, backaches, toothaches, colds, and fevers.
dosage: 1 tablet every 4 to 6 hours as needed. Do not exceed 4 tablets (4000mg) in 24 hours.
safetyAdvice: Do not take with other medicines containing paracetamol to prevent accidental overdose. Limit alcohol consumption.

name: Ibuprofen 400mg
description: Ibuprofen is a nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID). It works by reducing hormones that cause pain and inflammation in the body. Ideal for dental pain, menstrual cramps, and joint swelling.
dosage: Take one tablet with a glass of water after food. May repeat every 6 hours if pain persists.
safetyAdvice: Always take after meals to prevent gastric irritation. Avoid if you have active stomach ulcers or severe heart conditions.

name: Cetirizine 10mg
description: Cetirizine is an antihistamine that reduces the effects of natural chemical histamine in the body. Histamine can produce symptoms of sneezing, itching, watery eyes, and runny nose.
dosage: Take one tablet once daily, preferably at bedtime as it may cause mild drowsiness.
safetyAdvice: Be cautious when driving or operating machinery. Avoid combining with alcohol or sedatives.

name: Organic Multivitamin Gummies
description: A premium blend of 14 essential vitamins and minerals to support daily energy, immunity, muscle function, and overall metabolism. Made with organic fruit juices, gelatin-free, and delicious.
dosage: Chew 2 gummies daily. No water required.
safetyAdvice: Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: Omega-3 Fish Oil 1000mg
description: Provides high concentrations of EPA and DHA to support cardiovascular health, cognitive brain function, joint flexibility, and skin hydration. Enteric-coated to prevent fishy aftertaste.
dosage: Take one softgel twice daily with water and food.
safetyAdvice: Consult your physician if you are taking blood thinners or have an upcoming surgery.

name: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream
description: Developed with dermatologists, this cream has a unique formula that provides 24-hour hydration and helps restore the protective skin barrier with three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) and hyaluronic acid.
dosage: Apply liberally to face and body as often as needed, or as directed by a dermatologist.
sideEffects: None under normal usage. Stop if redness or irritation occurs.
safetyAdvice: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water.

name: Mineral SPF 50 Sunscreen
description: Ultra-lightweight mineral sunscreen fluid with high broad-spectrum SPF 50 protection. Formulated with Cell-Ox Shield technology and antioxidants. Fast-absorbing, water-resistant, and matte finish.
dosage: Shake well before use. Apply generously 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every 2 hours or after swimming.
safetyAdvice: Avoid prolonged sun exposure even when using sunscreen. Keep out of eyes.
